underlying_goal: Fix ESLint issues for Jira ticket RECO-621 in rollbar config file and update all usages/imports accordingly
friction_detail: Claude's initial refactoring approach for type guard functions didn't work with TypeScript narrowing, requiring a rollback to eslint-disable; then the user manually improved the solution and asked Claude to fix tests.
brief_summary: User asked to fix ESLint issues for RECO-621 in rollbar config and its usages; Claude refactored the code and tests, the user improved parts manually, and Claude successfully updated tests to match — all 11 tests passing.
